task: Advanced high-value task: Llm Code-Agent Trace Analysis Design Assumption Stress Test. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for llm code-agent trace analysis. Embedded packet: Records: R1 failure_count=28 pass_with_tests_pct=48 pass_without_tests_pct=7; R2 failure_count=37 pass_with_tests_pct=44 pass_without_tests_pct=10; R3 failure_count=23 pass_with_tests_pct=59 pass_without_tests_pct=6. Remediation options: O1 changes failure_count by -12% cost=71000; O2 changes pass_with_tests_pct by -18% cost=90600; O3 changes pass_without_tests_pct by -25% cost=51400; max_budget=115200. Rules and constraints: count>15 and pass-rate delta>20 points requires rubric change; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver agent_eval_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
